description: UrbanEdge Barbershop appears in discovery for two concurrent tenant import flows. Both see the same placeId. Your select_for_update / unique-constraint guard must prevent a double-import. The sandbox doesn't enforce the race — that lives in your DB layer. Rich review data is included so each worker does real work before hitting the conflict.

profile.description: Classic cuts and modern fades in the heart of Downtown Boston. Walk-ins welcome. Appointments preferred.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev001
200000001.comment: Best fade I've had in Boston. Marco takes his time and gets every line perfect. Casual vibe, great conversation, never feel rushed.

reviewReply.comment: Thanks Aaron! Marco is the heart of this shop. See you in a few weeks! ✂️

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev002
200000001.comment: Came in for a trim and beard shape-up for my partner — he was thrilled. Clean shop, classic barbershop smell, very professional. Booking online was easy.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev003
200000001.comment: Third time here, and it gets better every visit. They remembered how I like my taper — without me asking. That's the sign of a great shop.

reviewReply.comment: Carlos, your taper is basically muscle memory for us now! See you next month. 💈

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev004
200000001.comment: Good haircut but the wait was long — about 40 mins past my appointment time. The result was worth it but I'd appreciate better time management.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev005
200000001.comment: Had my son's first haircut here. The barber was incredibly patient with a wiggly 4-year-old. Gave him a little cape and let him hold the comb. He sat perfectly still. Magic.

reviewReply.comment: Eli, first haircuts are a big deal and we take them seriously! Bring him back anytime — we're now officially his barbershop. 🧒

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev006
200000001.comment: Great for a quick clean-up before a big presentation. Staff are efficient when you need it and relaxed when you don't. Always a consistent cut.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev007
200000001.comment: Booked a specific barber and when I arrived was told he'd called in sick. No notification sent. The barber who took over was fine but not what I booked for. Communication needs work.

reviewReply.comment: George, we apologize — call-outs should trigger an immediate notification to give you the chance to reschedule. We've fixed the booking system to automate this.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev008
200000001.comment: The hot towel shave upgrade is worth every penny. 30 minutes of pure luxury in the middle of a stressful workweek. Left feeling completely reset.

reviewReply.comment: Hannah, the hot towel shave is our favourite service to give. Glad it hit the spot! Book anytime. ☕

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev009
200000001.comment: Reliable, friendly, professional. My standard is 'mid fade, textured top' and they nail it every time. Prices have held steady which I appreciate.

200000001.name: accounts/100000001/locations/200000001/reviews/rev010
200000001.comment: Walked in on a whim after seeing the line of people outside — usually a great sign. Got a haircut from Marco that was genuinely the best I've had anywhere. Now I understand the line.

reviewReply.comment: Julia, the line outside is our best advertisement! Welcome to the regulars club. ✂️
